name: check_availability
description: Query Google Calendar freebusy for a date and return available appointment slot times. Tenant must have google_calendar_id and slot_duration_minutes set in PocketBase.
notes: Server handler built in server.js via POST /api/tools/check_availability. Awaiting live GCP credentials test. Parameters: date (YYYY-MM-DD), optional duration_minutes, start_hour, end_hour.
